title: Can't Charm Him
overview: Mona Kawai had never met a boy who could resist her charms. Enter Medaka Kuroiwa, who not only withstands her every move but also acts like he's disgusted by them! Is Mona's queen bee ego capable of taking no for an answer?

title: In Love with Him
overview: Mona continues her attempts to charm Medaka, but she suddenly realizes that she might have competition?

title: School Festival with Him
overview: It’s time for the school festival, and Mona is convinced that the event vibes will make her moves on Medaka more effective. Is she right, though?

title: Legend with Him
overview: Mona and Medaka find themselves at the Bridge of Love, the location of the school festival legend.

title: Basketball Girl with Him
overview: Mona and Medaka encounter Asahi Shonan, a strong-willed basketball star who seems rather confrontational.

title: Nursing with Him
overview: When Medaka comes down with a cold, caring for him becomes a new battleground for Mona and Asahi.

title: Lockscreen with Him
overview: A new battle arises over the fate of Medaka's phone wallpaper... and Halloween costumes for the girls.

title: Halloween with Him
overview: Mona sets out for the Halloween party, her sights set on making Medaka's lockscreen.

title: Best Friend with Him
overview: Tomo, Mona's childhood friend from Osaka, is here in Tokyo and ready to cause some chaos!

title: Theme Park with Him
overview: The gang hits up a theme park for Tomo's welcome party, and she and Asahi both have plans afoot!

title: Alone with Him
overview: Mona is stranded with Medaka at the theme park, leading to an important realization

title: First Love with Him
overview: Mona is in love! How will this change the dynamic between her and the gang, and Medaka most of all?
